title: Summoner returns its linked Limited Summon at end of turn

card.rawText: During your turn, roll 2 dice. You may summon a creature from your hand with an AL less than or equal to the result of the dice roll as a Limited Summon. Send the summoned creature back to your hand at the end of your turn.

plan.title: Summoner returns its linked Limited Summon at end of turn
plan.summary: Start with a Summoner-linked Limited Summon and verify the end-of-turn schedule returns it to hand.

notes: Place Summoner on player_1 field as primary.
Start with Sharkling Limited Summoned by and anchored to Summoner.
At the end of your turn, send the summoned creature back to your hand.

steps: Begin the end-of-turn cleanup for Summoner.
Resolve the scheduled return to hand.
Inspect player_1 field creatures and hand.
manualVerification: Only the creature summoned by Summoner should return at end of turn.
riskNotes: This validates end-turn cleanup, not source invalidation cleanup.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_044_summoner-044-e02 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
